title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Archon is an AI coding orchestration tool that automates workflow triggers from communication and project management platforms. A new Jira adapter enables automatic bug fixing and pull request creation from Jira tickets, with each ticket maintaining a dedicated conversation context.
